summary: Iteration 32: P0 Bug Fixes Verification. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All new confirm-sale fields working correctly (signature_date, member_type, subscription_end_date, billing fields). Frontend: Login, GHL Funnel Section, Members Page, and Renewal Dialog all verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test members with unique IDs created and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: 1) GHL confirm-sale endpoint accepts signature_date (stored as contract_signed_date), member_type, subscription_end_date, and all billing fields (billing_enabled, billing_amount, billing_cycle_type, billing_cycle_value, billing_payment_method). 2) GHL Funnel Section on Acquisition tab working with enhanced dialog structure. 3) Renewal dialog billing toggle working - overflow-y-auto fix verified with billing fields appearing correctly when toggled ON.

test_categories: TestGHLConfirmSaleNewFields (5 tests): signature_date, member_type, subscription_end_date, billing_enabled, without billing
TestGHLConfirmSaleFullPayload (1 test): Complete payload with all fields creates correct member
TestMemberRenewalBilling (1 test): Renewal with billing cycle update
TestGHLSyncAndLastSync (2 tests): GHL last-sync and sync-history endpoints
TestAPIHealthChecks (3 tests): Root, members, monthly-kpis endpoints

features_verified: GHL Funnel Section on Acquisition tab - PASS
Funnel visual shows 84 leads, 3 RDV, 1 Ventes - PASS
VENTES A CONFIRMER shows Caroline Maerten - PASS
Members page loads with 12 members - PASS
Renewal dialog billing toggle (Modifier le cycle de facturation) - PASS
Billing fields appear when toggle ON - PASS (Montant, Méthode, Cycle, Jour du mois)

fix_3.description: Renewal dialog billing toggle fix (overflow + stale closures)
fix_3.details: Dialog has overflow-y-auto, toggle works with setRenewData(prev => ({...prev})) pattern, billing fields appear correctly
